changes.change: Added CSS custom property override to lock gradient colors to neon-green
changes.details: Added scoped rule at the top of the file to override --gradient-left and --gradient-right on .testimonials-carousel block wrapper

buildWarnings: Performance warnings about bundle size (not errors)

colorValues.description: Neon-green to blue gradient (matches default :root values)

implementationNotes: Used scoped CSS custom property override rather than hard-coding gradient values
Preserves shared carousel styles in swiper.css for other blocks
All descendant elements inherit the fixed gradient values via CSS custom properties
No PHP changes needed - the color lock is purely CSS
Other carousel blocks (CardsCarousel, DynamicContentCarousel, GalleryCarousel) continue to respect page accent color
qaChecklist: Verify progress bar shows neon-green to blue on pages with non-neon-green accent colors
Verify navigation button hover shows neon-green to blue on all accent color pages
Verify modal close button hover shows neon-green to blue
Verify autoplay toggle button hover shows neon-green to blue
Verify other carousel blocks still respond to page accent color
Verify TestimonialsCarousel still looks correct on neon-green pages
